metadata.description: BMS Session API tools for HOSxP hospital databases in Thailand

plugins.name: bms-session-plugin
plugins.description: BMS Session API integration — /api/sql + /api/rest (110 tables, CRUD, auto-joins) + MCP server auto-configuration

plugins.name: bms-speckit
plugins.description: 12-step chain-orchestrated dev pipeline with research, rolling QC, SQL schema validation, real-database integration testing, HOSxP business logic semantic validation, and brand/layout consistency enforcement: brainstorm → research → constitution → specify → plan → tasks → analyze → implement (per-task integration tests + business logic + brand checks) → QC (9 dimensions including navbar/login/layout professional polish) → merge.
